# rh-ssg-grammar-and-language

Red Hat SSG review for grammar and language: conscious language (no
blacklist/whitelist, master/slave), no contractions in product docs,
conversational-style levels, minimalism (action-oriented, scannable,
concise), animate vs. inanimate user pronouns (who vs. that), and homograph
avoidance. Checklist-driven, no CLI arguments; composed by
`docs-review-style`. Takes precedence over `ibm-sg-language-and-grammar` for
Red Hat content.

**Plugin**: [docs-skills](index.md) | **:material-check: User-invocable**

## Usage

```bash
Check this Red Hat doc for conscious language and contraction usage
```
